title: Cursed feat Karl Kase
lyrics: Bring your negative, your curse down on me, bring your curse on me. Cursing at you, you're cursing at me. How does that reflect in the other's view of us? Or is it us without trust? I'm writing this curse, I curse myself from the cursing I did to tell you I'm right. Cause I know it, but I don't show it, yeah. There's no reason for me to say I'm right, because perspective wins in the end of the night. It's your fight, it's your flight, it's all you're moving. I just wanna be an extra, come on chat, I swear it grew because cursing us is gonna curse. Every step we take beyond that with the negative we hit and fight back with. Yeah, cursing us till the end of our legit. I don't wanna lose you now. I don't wanna lose any progress we found as this human race. We've gotta stand this test, hey. We're cursed if we curse. We're cursed if we just judge and put us down before we even stood up for the test now. No one's giving you your final grade, yeah. No one's giving you the okay to fail yourself and flunk out of life, so stop cursing yourself. In the end you'll find that you're your own worst enemy. And all you did to hold yourself up was all just a temporary release from the curse that your parents gave to you. But they didn't know and you better even do. You've been manipulated from the groove, right on the whack so you can't put your heart out. Telling people they're wrong for their own view of them. It can't be that way, you're not them, you're only you. Fucking with the curse of you. You don't know your own strength to fight on through it, yeah. Giving to gifts but gifts by God to us from our own heart, yeah. Stop the curse. Stop the hurts, yeah. When it's over, it's over. When there's no more, there's no more. So stop cursing at yourself and telling yourself that your life isn't your life. It is and it's pretty. It's pretty like pretty pink, pink, pink, pink, pink, pink, pink, pink, pink, pink flowers. Like, you spread it open a little bit and it's like pink. It's like where we came from, you know what I'm saying? It's pretty and pink. I think that's what I meant to say.
